en: Am I not free? Am I not an apostle? Have I not seen Jesus our Lord? Are not you my workmanship in the Lord?
zh: 我不是自由的嗎？我不是使徒嗎？我不是見過我們的主耶穌嗎？你們不是我在主裡面的工作嗎？

en: If to others I am not an apostle, at least I am to you, for you are the seal of my apostleship in the Lord.
zh: 對別人來說，我或許不是使徒，但對你們來說，我總是使徒，因為你們就是我在主裡作使徒的印記。

en: This is my defense to those who would examine me.
zh: 對那些盤問我的人，這就是我的答辯。

en: Do we not have the right to eat and drink?
zh: 難道我們沒有權利吃喝嗎？

en: Do we not have the right to take along a believing wife, as do the other apostles and the brothers of the Lord and Cephas?
zh: 難道我們沒有權利，像其餘的使徒、主的弟兄和磯法一樣，帶著信主的妻子往來嗎？

en: Or is it only Barnabas and I who have no right to refrain from working for a living?
zh: 難道只有我和巴拿巴沒有權利不作工嗎？

en: Who serves as a soldier at his own expense? Who plants a vineyard without eating any of its fruit? Or who tends a flock without getting some of the milk?
zh: 有誰當兵要自備糧餉呢？有誰栽種葡萄園，不吃園裡的果子呢？有誰牧養羊群，不喝羊的奶呢？

en: Do I say these things on human authority? Does not the Law say the same?
zh: 我說這話，不是照著人的意見，律法不也是這樣說嗎？

en: For it is written in the Law of Moses, "You shall not muzzle an ox when it treads out the grain." Is it for oxen that God is concerned?
zh: 就在摩西的律法上記著說：“牛踹穀的時候，不可籠住牠的嘴。”難道 神關心的只是牛嗎？

en: Does he not speak entirely for our sake? It was written for our sake, because the plowman should plow in hope and the thresher thresh in hope of sharing in the crop.
zh: 這不全是為我們說的嗎？當然是為我們說的，因為耕種的應當存著希望去耕種，收割的也應當存著希望去分享收穫。

en: If we have sown spiritual things among you, is it too much if we reap material things from you?
zh: 我們既然在你們中間撒了屬靈的種子，如果要從你們那裡收穫一些物質的供應，這算是過分嗎？

en: If others share this rightful claim on you, do not we even more? Nevertheless, we have not made use of this right, but we endure anything rather than put an obstacle in the way of the gospel of Christ.
zh: 如果別人在你們身上享有這種權利，我們不是更可以享有嗎？ 然而我們沒有用過這種權利，反而凡事容忍，免得我們攔阻了基督的福音。

en: Do you not know that those who are employed in the temple service get their food from the temple, and those who serve at the altar share in the sacrificial offerings?
zh: 難道你們不知道，在聖殿供職的，就吃殿中的供物；侍候祭壇的，就分領壇上的祭物嗎？

en: In the same way, the Lord commanded that those who proclaim the gospel should get their living by the gospel.
zh: 主也曾這樣吩咐，叫傳福音的人靠福音為生。

en: But I have made no use of any of these rights, nor am I writing these things to secure any such provision. For I would rather die than have anyone deprive me of my ground for boasting.
zh: 但這種權利，我一點也沒有用過。我寫這些話，並不是想叫人這樣待我，因為我寧可死，也不讓人使我所誇耀的落了空。

en: For if I preach the gospel, that gives me no ground for boasting. For necessity is laid upon me. Woe to me if I do not preach the gospel!
zh: 我傳福音原是沒有可誇的，因我不能不傳。如果不傳福音，我就有禍了。

en: For if I do this of my own will, I have a reward, but not of my own will, I am still entrusted with a stewardship.
zh: 如果我甘心作這事，就有賞賜；即使不甘心，這職責還是託付我了。

en: What then is my reward? That in my preaching I may present the gospel free of charge, so as not to make full use of my right in the gospel.
zh: 那麼，我的賞賜是甚麼呢？就是我傳福音時，叫人免費得著福音。這樣，我就沒有用過傳福音可以享有的權利了。

en: For though I am free from all, I have made myself a servant to all, that I might win more of them.
zh: 我雖然自由，不受任何人管轄，但我自願成為眾人的奴僕，為的是要多得一些人。

en: To the Jews I became as a Jew, in order to win Jews. To those under the law I became as one under the law (though not being myself under the law) that I might win those under the law.
zh: 對猶太人，我就作猶太人，為了要得著猶太人；對律法以下的人，雖然我自己不在律法之下，還是作了律法以下的人，為了要得著律法以下的人。

en: To those outside the law I became as one outside the law (not being outside the law of God but under the law of Christ) that I might win those outside the law.
zh: 對沒有律法的人，我就作了沒有律法的人，其實我不是在 神的律法以外，而是在基督的律法之下，為了要得著沒有律法的人。

en: To the weak I became weak, that I might win the weak. I have become all things to all people, that by all means I might save some.
zh: 對軟弱的人，我就成了軟弱的人，為了要得著軟弱的人。對怎麼樣的人，我就作怎麼樣的人；無論如何，總要救一些人。

en: I do it all for the sake of the gospel, that I may share with them in its blessings.
zh: 我所作的一切，都是為了福音的緣故，好讓我與別人同享福音的好處。

en: Do you not know that in a race all the runners compete, but only one receives the prize? So run that you may obtain it.
zh: 難道你們不知道，在場上賽跑的人，雖然大家都跑，但得獎的只有一個人嗎？你們都應當這樣跑，好叫你們可以得獎。

en: Every athlete exercises self-control in all things. They do it to receive a perishable wreath, but we an imperishable.
zh: 凡參加運動比賽的，在一切事上都有節制；他們這樣作，不過要得到能壞的冠冕，我們卻是要得不朽的冠冕。

en: So I do not run aimlessly; I do not box as one beating the air.
zh: 所以我奔跑，不是沒有目標的；我鬥拳，不是打空氣的。

en: But I discipline my body and keep it under control, lest after preaching to others I myself should be disqualified.
zh: 我要克制自己的身體，叫身體服我，免得我傳了給別人，自己反而落選了。
